description: 20 exec-facing probe queries used by brain-quality.js to measure Score-R retrieval. Any changes to the brain must improve average hit count on this probe set without regressing Score-H or Score-U.
queries: What are the FY27 priorities and why do they matter?
Which markets did the DE delivery SLA regression hit?

Who owns the FTBP conversion target?
What are the top cancellation reasons from SIOO tagging?
